{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322200447838679288E16B9866DAB"}"},"total":109},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610573511124042521","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"追到最新章节了，说说我的评价，其他来看的可以参考一下，第一点综漫人物出奇的融合的不差，不是说多惊艳，而是在融合中他没什么错，这点很难能可贵，第二点，故事背景和现在追到的章节的设定和故事都很有趣，暂时没什么大缺点，曾经的恩怨也在慢慢展现，让人很想知道接下来发生什么，来看咒回的，这很不错，多的就不说了，毕竟字数也不是很多，期待接下来的发展"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771980260,"group_id":"7607323097540086809","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwA2XAFaCPJYtkg+zJLGwF32AjLCi/MayS8a82LVxKTu","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"4473229190104616","user_name":"用户44732291"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4473229190104616","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7607323097540086809","book_info":{"abstract":"［综漫］+［咒术回战］+［路人女主］

sten_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5625,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":11245},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618636821476492057","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看的差不多了，我认为这本书是被评分和评论埋没的一本咒回优秀作品，但作为综漫有点不符，因为只是出现了路人女主和咒回的角色，但作者的节奏与情节设计足够优秀，能一直在推荐榜上不是没有理由的，我很多次因为评分和评论跳过这本书，说实话这样很有失偏颇，希望有新人的话，别被评论和安艺所影响，让你看到后20张左右，这书一定会发挥它的魅力，最后，希望作者别断更了多更点！！！！！！！！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773855951,"group_id":"7607323097540086809","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5qfPmYOfX9Tr1oKiyi+uXZ+gymqnINCyFjYg74gcQWY","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1761848382204637","user_name":"光怪陆离的方隆"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1761848382204637","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7607323097540086809","book_info":{"abstract":"［综漫］+［咒术回战］+［路人女主］

不煽情无脑，羁绊，不像火影中鸣人那样，舔狗傻乎乎的感觉，
有点像棋魂中藤原佐为那种穿越时光的沧桑感，带有一种神性，慈悲心，仙人飘渺之感。
而且不像很多小说动不动就是系统，老爷爷，无脑开挂，
剧情上虽然不是那种从弱变强的逻辑，展开都是偏日常，但是确实有一种吸引力。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773065748,"group_id":"7607323097540086809","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人生本身就是一段无法回头的旅途，我们经历一段旅程，愿你我不孤","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxkTyn77+LtTKXimrjwlJ4rSzGWPQBGZjKH2IJU18IBw","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3157416256482638","user_name":"作者龙逍遥Z"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3157416256482638","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7607323097540086809","book_info":{"abstract":"［综漫］+［咒术回战］+［路人女主］
